description: Browse, search, deploy, and generate Protagon AI character identities. Deploy loads a rich SOUL.md personality for the agent to adopt.
author: Protagons

tools.name: protagons_list
tools.description: List available Protagons from the public library. Returns an agent-friendly summary with name, tagline, slug, and category for each character.

tools.name: protagons_search
tools.description: Search for Protagons by keyword or category. Returns a numbered list of matching characters with name, tagline, category, and slug. Use this when the user wants to find a specific type of character.

search.description: Free-text search query (e.g. 'dry and technical', 'friendly copywriter')

tools.name: protagons_categories
tools.description: List all available Protagon categories. Use this to help users narrow down what kind of character they want.

tools.name: protagons_get
tools.description: Fetch a single Protagon by slug. Returns the full .protagon.json with all dimensions, personality, and synthesized prompt.

tools.name: protagons_deploy
tools.description: Load a Protagon character identity. Fetches a rich, pre-generated SOUL.md from the Protagons API and returns it as content for the agent to adopt. Does not write to disk — the caller decides how to apply the identity.

tools.name: protagons_status
tools.description: Check the Protagons skill status and get hints for verifying the active character identity.

tools.name: protagons_generate
tools.description: Generate a new Protagon from a description. Your Google API key is sent to the Protagons backend (api.usaw.ai) which calls Gemini on your behalf — the key is used only for that request and is not stored. Use a scoped or throwaway key if preferred.

google_api_key.description: Google/Gemini API key (BYOK) — sent to api.usaw.ai for server-side Gemini call, not stored
